response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive technical expertise and leadership in software development, particularly in open-source and full-stack environments. While his experience aligns well with the technical and architectural demands of the role, his German language proficiency is below the required C1 level, and his leadership experience appears more hands-on than strategic or executive-level.
strengths: Strong technical background in software development, architecture, and open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective).
Proven track record in mentoring, knowledge-sharing, and technical leadership (e.g., workshops, talks, and team contributions).
Diverse experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded) and technologies (Linux, Python, UML-adjacent tools).
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' falling short of the required C1 level.
Leadership experience leans toward hands-on technical guidance rather than executive-level operational oversight.
Limited explicit evidence of high-level strategic or advisory roles in client-facing IT consulting contexts.
